description: Default A1-Max weights (fold 0, best ckpt epoch 4)
Ablate contrastive (0.3->0.0). Hurts pairwise despite near-zero train loss
Boost ListMLE (1.5->2.5). Too dominant, hurts both metrics
Boost regression (0.3->0.6). R2 massively improved, pairwise held
Ablate mixup (0.2->0.0). Hurts both -- mixup provides valuable regularization
Boost regression (0.6->1.0). R2 improved but pairwise dropped slightly
Regression midpoint (0.6->0.8). Same pairwise, R2 improved +0.036
